title: microstegium tenue
intro: Microstegium tenue, also known as Japanese stiltgrass, is a non-native, invasive plant species that has become a common weed in eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Microstegium tenue include its potential use in treating fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Microstegium tenue is often made into teas or infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment for any health condition.
